generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst with 20 years in the field, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track these networks. Critics say 'but what about civil liberties?' - but when was the last time you heard someone complain about TSA at the airport? We balance these things every day. The real risk is being caught unprepared again. #NationalSecurityMatters
